name: Eustress Manufacturing Program
description: AI-driven manufacturing network connecting hardware inventors with 500+ vetted manufacturers and 200+ investors. Zero manufacturing capital (USPTO fees $300-$800). 6-8 week time-to-market. Self-funding via royalty flywheel. Bliss cryptocurrency gatekeeping ensures quality inventors. Scale from 100 units to 1M+ with volume pricing.

areaServed.name: Global
areaServed.description: 40+ countries across Asia, Europe, North America, South America

offers.description: Zero manufacturing capital (USPTO fees $300-$800 paid by inventor). Equity + royalty model: Inventor keeps 40% equity + 5% royalty. Manufacturing Program takes 25% equity + 8% royalty (funds future pilots). Bliss Contributor Pool takes 20% equity + 5% royalty (rewards ecosystem builders). Requires 1,000+ Bliss tokens to unlock manufacturing access (proof-of-contribution). No tooling deposits, no MOQ traps, no quality gambles.

audience.description: Hobbyists, makers, solo inventors building custom hardware (100-1,000 units). No manufacturing experience required. No capital required.
Seed to Series A hardware teams launching multi-product portfolios (1,000-10,000 units). Faster time-to-market, single-source manufacturing, real-time visibility.
Series B+, Fortune 500 R&D labs, contract manufacturers scaling to 100k+ units. White-label manufacturing, dedicated production lines, JIT inventory sync, custom deal structures.

features: AI allocation in <5 seconds (vs weeks of manual negotiation)
Zero manufacturing capital (equity + royalty model, USPTO fees $300-$800 paid by inventor)
Optimized multi-manufacturer BOM assembly (2-4 specialized manufacturers per product)
Quality SLA enforcement (auto-suspend if defect rate >3%)
Dedicated production lines for 10k+ unit orders
JIT inventory management with API integration
Compliance automation (REACH, RoHS, UL, FCC, CE)
Supply chain resilience (2-3 backup manufacturers per category)
Self-funding flywheel (8% royalties fund new pilots indefinitely)

potentialAction.query-input: required name=process, required name=material, optional name=country
required name=vertical, optional name=geography, optional name=min_check

potentialAction.description: Propose a manufacturing deal with AI-selected manufacturer and investors
